justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted all of the user's temporal requests throughout the conversation.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent consistently reported unavailability and then asked the user to pick a new time without offering any alternative options.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent repeated the same response and question in every turn after the first, leading to a very inefficient conversation.
justifications.customer_experience: The repeated apologies and identical questions in every turn made the conversation frustrating and unproductive for the customer.

judge_scores.overall_notes: The agent was stuck in a loop of reporting unavailability and asking the user to suggest another time, without offering any proactive suggestions or broader availability checks.
